title: Nihon jokyo-den: tekka geisha
original_title: 日本女侠伝 鉄火芸者
overview: Young geisha Koshizu's wish of reuniting with the man, Yukichi, who helped her ten years ago comes true. When she learns of the trouble Yukichi's business is facing, she stands ready to come to his aid, and thus repay a debt that's long overdue.

trailers.title: 「日本女侠伝　鉄火芸者」(公開年月日 1970年08月01日)　予告篇
